faculty: Faculty of Agricultural and Environmental Sciences
description: The development of commercial agriculture relies on a large supporting sector of manufacturing and service companies involved in the supply of inputs to farming and the transportation, processing, and marketing of agricultural and food products. This 24-credit specialization includes courses in agricultural sciences, agribusiness, and courses at the Desautels Faculty of Management. This specialization is limited to students in the Major in Agricultural Economics. For information on academic advising, see: http://www.mcgill.ca/macdonald/studentinfo/advising
